metadata.description: Marketing plugins for Claude Code and Anthropic Cowork. All plugins ship zero global hooks and zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence; comply with the Anthropic Software Directory Policy; HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology. v3.0 introduced the 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Update-Back Rule, and Living Project Instruction File on top of 25 specialist agents, 141 atomic skills, 65 Python scripts, and 14 HTTP MCP connectors covering 16 industry profiles and 16 privacy-law jurisdictions. v3.1 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence (the prior mcp_.* matcher used to gate every MCP call from every installed plugin — the most acute coexistence issue in the marketing suite).

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, and 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors. v3.9 ships a 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer (adapted from Wikipedia: Signs of AI writing + blader/humanizer), a self-critique meta-pass, and optional voice calibration from a brand writing sample. v3.9.1 adds Cowork-compatible aggregator MCPs (Pipedream, Composio, Zapier, Make.com) covering Google Sheets/Drive and 1000+ other SaaS services for teams that cannot run npx/stdio MCPs.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation with asset-first compositing, AI image generation (Vertex AI / Nano Banana Pro), and video generation (WaveSpeed / Kling v3.0 Pro). 19 commands, 15 skills, 5 agents, 18 scripts, 10 HTTP connectors. All AI-generated visuals require explicit user approval before use. v1.5 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence — credential status now via /sf:status on demand.
